content: is standard wheel banner different? cause I'm on 6 pages and I still haven't hit an SSR wheel since my last one

30, 33% chance of receiving the rate up. if you miss the rate up twice, the third one is guarantee.
worse case scenerio it's 18000 silver core per wheel/character, but that's the worse case scenario.
So it is 18k for character and 12k for limited Wheel
While rate up for permanent Wheel is like limited character 33% and offrate count is twice

Wheel mainstats is silver key charge... this is bad...

At the start of Exploration, add one "Silver Key Sunlight" and Depleted effect to it. Whenever using Silver key, the wearer crit dmg will increase x/y/z/...%, Whenever the wearer causes dmg, they will gain silver key charge corresponding to 50/60/70/80% of the wear silver key charge stats and temporary crit rate of 5/6/7/8%, up to 5 times per turn.

each time dmg is caused, it will take away 13 temporary str from the target, then you select a non-consumable (thing like inspiration) and non-derived command card in your hand, add Repeating Music orison to it

Repeating music: play again after being played, but repeating will become charging music effect
Charging music: After play, Hameln gains 3 madness point.

if you dont have enough mana to activate it, you can "FORCE" it to activate, but instead of putting 2 inspiration to "YOUR HAND" it will be put in "DRAW POOL"
you can either increase cost by 2 to use the next card twice or decrease next card cost by 2

at the beginning of the map

every single use card replenishes between battles

no matter you use them or not

you can do that in current salvador event
it gone but next battle can use again
and i am fairly sure those reappear in the deck
because next battle you add them in your deck/hand/discard pool again
